component.name: Notepad Extra
component.summary: Small, fast, fully offline text and code editor

description.p: Notepad Extra is a small, fast, fully offline text and code editor for Windows, macOS and Linux, built as a native Rust application and inspired by Notepad++.

ul.li: Syntax highlighting for 200+ languages, with automatic detection from the file extension
Find, Replace and Go-to-line, with regex and case options
Word wrap toggle, editor zoom, and light and dark themes
Preserves each file's original line endings (LF or CRLF) on save
Works fully offline and makes no network requests
